_comment: Transparent, HAND-SET logistic surrogate for the Jasodanand et al. (Nat Commun 2025, vkola-lab/ncomms2025) multimodal fusion transformer that predicts individual Abeta & tau PET status. These coefficients are set from biomarker directionality (domain knowledge) — they are NOT fitted to any cohort and NOT calibrated to the published transformer's AUROC (paper reports Abeta AUROC~0.79, tau AUROC~0.84; those belong to the REAL model, never to this stand-in). Standardization means/scales are rough plasma/volumetric population anchors, not dataset-derived. Source of the schema/target names: vkola-lab/ncomms2025 dev/data/toml_files/stage_1_eval.toml (targets amy_label, tau_label). This snapshot exists so the offline surrogate is auditable and versioned, NOT because it carries real per-subject data (the repo ships none usable: pseudodata is random, source_data is aggregate).

hippocampal_volume.note: bilateral hippocampus mm^3; lower = more atrophy
